Explanation:
The "champion" designation appears in the postseason column for the Bundesliga seasons. The team was champion in 2004–05 (single), 2006–07 (single), and then for four consecutive seasons: 2009–10, 2010–11, 2011–12, and 2012–13. Thus, the longest consecutive run of Bundesliga champions is 4 years.
